name: Abandoned Cart Recovery
description: 3-step recovery: 1hr email, 24hr email with social proof, 48hr email with discount.

steps.subject: You left something behind, {{first_name}}
steps.preview_text: Your cart is waiting for you.
steps.body_html:
Forgot Something?

Hi {{first_name}},

It looks like you left some items in your cart. Don't worry — we saved them for you.

Complete Your Order
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, you left items in your cart. Complete your order at {{site_url}}cart/.

steps.subject: People are loving these products
steps.preview_text: See why others chose the same items.
steps.body_html:
Still Thinking It Over?

Hi {{first_name}},

The items in your cart are popular choices. Our customers love them — and we think you will too.

Don't miss out before they sell out!

Return to Your Cart
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, your cart items are popular picks. Complete your order before they sell out: {{site_url}}cart/.

steps.subject: Last chance — 10% off your cart
steps.preview_text: A special discount to help you decide.
steps.body_html:
Final Reminder

Hi {{first_name}},

We really want you to have these items! Here's a special 10% discount to seal the deal.

Use code: CART10

Complete Your Order

This code expires in 24 hours.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, here's 10% off your cart. Use code CART10 at {{site_url}}cart/. Expires in 24 hours.
